description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a dark, multi-hipped roof and a modern, low-profile design. The exterior walls are clad in dark stone or brick, giving the house a contemporary and sturdy appearance. The front features a covered porch with steps leading up to the main entry, flanked by landscaped garden beds and palm trees. Two cars are parked in a driveway adjacent to the entry, and a small patio area with outdoor seating is visible at the rear. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with a mix of standard and larger panes for natural light. The property is bordered by low hedges and includes minimal but well-maintained landscaping.
description: A modern, single-story house with a dark hipped roof, stone exterior, covered porch, driveway, and landscaped garden beds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with steps, covered porch, two parked cars, and landscaped garden beds with palm trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical window arrangement, backyard landscaping, and absence of visible entryways.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the house's depth, roof complexity, and a glimpse of the porch and garden area.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the patio with outdoor seating, garage side, and both cars in the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with a mix of standard and larger windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, single main door, flanked by garden beds and palm trees, minimal decorative elements
